# Hangmango

> Hangmango is a free, browser-based word guessing game available in 7 languages — a modern, child-friendly alternative to traditional hangman. No downloads or accounts required.

## Languages
- English: https://hangmango.net/
- Spanish (Latin American): https://hangmango.net/es/
- French: https://hangmango.net/fr/
- Brazilian Portuguese: https://hangmango.net/pt/
- German: https://hangmango.net/de/
- Welsh: https://hangmango.net/cy/
- Turkish: https://hangmango.net/tr/

## Key facts
- Free to play, no login required
- Works on mobile, tablet and desktop
- 7 language versions with localised word lists
- Child-friendly alternative to hangman — no gallows imagery
- Custom word mode for classroom and family use
- Made by Silly Games Lab: https://sillygameslab.com
